requirement_topic.en: Scope Delimitation — Occupational Filtering Respirator versus Medical-Mask or Telecom-Enhanced Device
requirement_topic.zh: 范围界定——职业过滤呼吸器与医用口罩或通信增强设备
requirement_topic.zht: 範圍界定——職業過濾呼吸器與醫用口罩或通信增強設備

summary.en: The comparison is for filtering respirators used as occupational PPE under Thailand occupational safety control expectations. Medical masks, surgical-use masks, or respirators used as a therapeutic or infection-control medical claim are out-of-scope unless Thai health-device licensing is separately addressed. Telecom-enabled respirators with radio modules are not treated as standard PPE-only products and need NBTC assessment. Power-assist or alarm-equipped models with electrical modules should also be screened against EGAT/DEDE pathways in addition to TISI and Ministry of Labour alignment.
summary.zh: 本对照范围为泰国职业安全控制预期下的职业用过滤式呼吸器。医用口罩、外科口罩或以治疗/防感染医疗用途销售的呼吸器不在本范围之内，除非另行处理泰国健康器械许可。具无线电通信模块的通信增强型呼吸器不能视为纯PPE产品，应按NBTC评估。带电机动或报警附件的型号应在TISI与劳动部框架之外，另行按EGAT/DEDE路径筛查。
summary.zht: 本對照範圍為泰國職業安全控制預期下的職業用過濾式呼吸器。醫用口罩、外科口罩或以治療/防感染醫療用途銷售的呼吸器不在本範圍內，除非另行處理泰國健康器械許可。具無線電通信模組的通信增強型呼吸器不能視為純PPE產品，應按NBTC評估。帶電動力或警報附件的型號應在TISI與勞動部框架之外，另行按EGAT/DEDE路徑篩查。

standards_or_laws: TISI and Ministry of Labour framework for occupational PPE markets
NBTC telecom classification and approval framework for wireless functions
DEDE/EGAT electric-efficiency and electrical-policy checks for powered components, where applicable

summary.en: In China, GB 2626-2019 and its related GB standards are used for industrial filtering respirators, while GB 19083 and YY 0469-related processes cover medical claims. GB law and certification routes are also model- and function-specific. No Chinese category map is a one-to-one replacement for Thai scope selection.
summary.zh: 在中国，GB 2626-2019及相关GB标准用于工业过滤式呼吸器；GB 19083及YY 0469相关流程覆盖医用声明。中国法规与认证路径亦按型号和用途决定。不存在可直接一一替代的泰国范围映射。
summary.zht: 在中國，GB 2626-2019及相關GB標準用於工業過濾式呼吸器；GB 19083及YY 0469相關流程覆蓋醫用聲明。中國法規與認證路徑亦按型號和用途決定。不存在可直接一一替代的泰國範圍映射。

gap.en: Exporters must map product intent and module list before choosing a Thai route. If the model is only occupational PPE, use the TISI plus Ministry of Labour industrial chain. If telematics, radio, connectivity, or powered electronics are claimed, prepare additional Thai telecom and electrical policy checks. If the model is positioned as medical, do not rely on PPE-only assumptions.
gap.zh: 出口商应先映射产品用途和模块组合再选择泰国路线。若仅为职业PPE，则采用TISI加劳动部的工业链条；若主张具备通信、无线、网络连接或动力电子组件，则需另外准备泰国电信与电气政策核查。若产品定位为医用用途，不可使用纯PPE路径假定。
gap.zht: 出口商應先映射產品用途和模組組合再選擇泰國路線。若僅為職業PPE，則採用TISI加勞動部的工業鏈條；若主張具備通信、無線、網路連接或動力電子元件，則需另外準備泰國電信與電氣政策核查。若產品定位為醫用用途，不可使用純PPE路徑假定。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — PPE-only route is mandatory only when the model is used as occupational PPE; medical or telecom-enhanced claims trigger additional Thai routes.
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional — CN 2626/19083 classification is mandatory in China for the relevant design use, and product evidence must match purpose before Thailand comparison.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Define the Thai route by intended use first, then match standards and approvals. A model sold as occupational filtering PPE does not automatically satisfy medical or telecom requirements, and a model with telecom or medical claims does not stay in the PPE-only path.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应先按预期用途定义泰国路径，再匹配对应标准与审批。以职业过滤PPE出售的型号并不自动满足医用或通信要求，而具医用或通信声明的型号也不属于纯PPE-only路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應先按預期用途定義泰國路徑，再匹配對應標準與審批。以職業過濾PPE出售的型號並不自動滿足醫用或通信要求，而具醫用或通信聲明的型號也不屬於純PPE-only路徑。
